title: hieracium picroides subsp. subintermixtum
intro: Hieracium picroides subsp. subintermixtum is a plant species, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or Chinese hawkweed, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Traditionally, Hieracium picroides subsp. subintermixtum is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink.
